creator: hubert@tournier.org
text:
Hello,

I approve the patch.

Thank you,

Hubert Tournier


Le 30/04/2011 13:30, Edwin Groothuis a écrit :
> Maintainer of www/geneweb,
>
> Please note that PR ports/156732 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/156732
>
